empty.title: No spec files yet
empty.body: Drop your PRDs, tech specs, and acceptance criteria under specs/, docs/, or insights/ in this repo. Every agent and skill can then attach them as grounding context.

newFile.title: New document
newFile.subtitle: Created inside the repo clone; discoverable by every agent and skill.

newFolder.title: New folder
newFolder.subtitle: Must live under specs/, docs/, or insights/.

preview.select: Select a document to preview it.
